curation_notes: The patch commit (3fff915) modifies only epyt_flow/serialization.py. The vulnerable code is in my_load_from_json's inner __object_hook function, which used importlib.import_module to dynamically import and instantiate any class specified via the __type__ field in JSON. The patch replaces this with an allowlist (JSON_SERIALIZABLE dict) that only permits pre-registered JsonSerializable subclasses. Location derived directly from the patch diff — the advisory description also confirms the my_load_from_json deserializer as the vulnerable component.
